landing.tagline: Free to use · No coding required
landing.subtitle: Automatic Discord notifications for Twitch and YouTube. Go-live alerts, clips, recaps, and more.
landing.liveAlertsDesc: Instant notifications when any Twitch streamer goes live
landing.clipsRecapsDesc: Auto-share new clips and post stream recaps when channels go offline
landing.youtubeDesc: Announce new videos and YouTube live streams automatically
landing.communityDesc: Welcome messages, milestone celebrations, and subscriber sync
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.availableServersDesc: The bot is in these servers. Claim one to start configuring.
dashboard.noServers: No servers yet. Add the bot to a Discord server to get started.
dashboard.broadcasterAuthorized: Broadcaster authorized! Sub sync is now available.
dashboard.guildLimit: You've reached the server limit for your plan.
dashboard.alreadyClaimed: This server is already configured by another user.
guild.channelAdded: Channel added! Notifications will start shortly.
guild.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields.
guild.upgradeClips: Clip notifications require a Starter plan or higher.
guild.upgradeYoutube: YouTube notifications require a Starter plan or higher.
guild.channelLimit: You've reached the channel limit for your plan.
guild.addTwitchDesc: Enter any Twitch username. Choose separate Discord channels for live alerts and clips, or leave one blank to disable it.
guild.noTwitchChannels: No Twitch channels being watched yet.
guild.addYoutubeDesc: Enter a YouTube Channel ID (starts with UC) to get notified about new videos, shorts, and live streams.
guild.noYoutubeChannels: No YouTube channels being watched yet.
guild.broadcasterRequired: You need to authorize broadcaster access for sub sync to work.
guild.activityFeedDesc: Automatic posts that keep your server active around stream activity.
guild.streamRecapsDesc: Post a summary when a stream ends — duration, category, and top clips.
guild.milestonesDesc: Announce when a channel hits follower or subscriber milestones.
guild.milestonesTokenRequired: Requires broadcaster authorization to access follower/sub counts.
guild.weeklyHighlightsDesc: Post a weekly digest every Monday with stream stats and top clips.
guild.removeBotDesc: This will remove all notification settings and make the bot leave this Discord server.
guild.removeConfirm: Are you sure? The bot will leave this server and all notification settings will be deleted.
pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: All plans billed annually. Cancel anytime.
subscription.title: My Subscription
subscription.activated: Subscription activated! Enjoy your new features.
subscription.cancelledMsg: Your subscription has been cancelled. You're now on the Free plan.
report.title: Report an Issue
report.desc: Found a bug or have a suggestion? Let us know and we'll take a look.
report.subject: Subject
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail. Include steps to reproduce if it's a bug.
report.submitted: Your issue has been submitted. We'll look into it!
